ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "student_type" TEXT /* Type of student (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., ENGL101) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher responsible for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the grade is awarded */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester during which the grade was assigned */,
  "grade_points" REAL /* Numerical value of the grade */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Teacher's comments on the student's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the teacher is assigned */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the teacher */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the teacher (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose parent is being recorded */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent or guardian */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the parent or guardian */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the student (e.g., Mother, Father, Guardian) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Mathematics, English) */,
  "head_of_department" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "building_location" TEXT /* Building location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "reason_for_absence" TEXT /* Reason for absence if the student was absent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurriculars" (
  "extracurricular_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Soccer Team) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the activity (e.g., Player, Manager) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the student joined the activity */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours per week dedicated to the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extracurricular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurriculars_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the transcript was issued */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average of the student */,
  "credits_completed" INTEGER /* Total credits completed by the student */,
  "honors_status" TEXT /* Honors status of the student (e.g., Honor Roll) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Semester during which the schedule applies */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date when the schedule was created or modified */,
  "time_slot" TEXT /* Time slot for the course (e.g., 10:00 AM - 11:00 AM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the notification has been read (e.g., Read, Unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
